zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Sanford於大約1212年出生在英國波克夏諾斯 莫雷頓時，她的父親Hugh De Stanford27歲，母親Joan Noers24歲。她於1234年之前與Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1242年12月25日在英國奧可福爾武德斯托可享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Sanford于大约1212年出生在英国波克夏諾斯 莫雷頓时，她的父亲Hugh De Stanford27岁，母亲Joan Noers24岁。她于1234年之前与Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1242年12月25日在英国奧可福爾武德斯托可享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sanford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sandford
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England with names derived from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ford ‘ford, river crossing’, such as Sandford in Warcop (Westmorland), Sandford in Sonning and Dry Sandford in Abingdon (both Berkshire), Sandford on Thames and Sandford Saint Martin (both Oxfordshire), Great and Little Sampford (Essex), Sandford Orcas (Dorset), Sandford, Sampford Courtney, Sampford Peverell, and Sampford Spiney (all Devon), Sampford Arundel and Sampford Brett (both Somerset), and Sandford (Shropshire). See also Sandiford .

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Sanford was born about 1212, in North Moreton, Berkshire, England, her father, Hugh De Stanford, was 27 and her mother, Joan Noers, was 24. She married Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh before 1234. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 25 December 1242, in Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Sanford est née environ 1212, à North Moreton, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh De Stanford, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Noers, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh avant 1234. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 25 décembre 1242, à Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, Englan: Great Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Sanford um 1212 in North Moreton, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh De Stanford 27 und ihre Mutter Joan Noers 24. Sie hat vor 1234 Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 25. Dezember 1242 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Sanford è nata il circa 1212 nel North Moreton, Berkshire, England, sua padre, Hugh De Stanford, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Joan Noers, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh prima del 1234. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 dicembre 1242, nel Woodstock, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Sanfordが約1212年にイギリスバークシュアイアノース モーエトンで生まれた時，父Hugh De Stanfordは27歳，母Joan Noersは24歳であった。1234年以前にSir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarshと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1242年12月25日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアウッドストックで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Sanford(이)가 대략 1212년 영국 버크실르 노르스 모레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh De Stanford(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Noers(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1234년 이전 Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1242년 12월 25일 영국 스퍼드실르 우드스톡에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Sanford nasceu aproximadamente 1212, em North Moreton, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh De Stanford, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Noers, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh antes 1234. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1242, em Woodstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Sanford родилась около 1212 г. в местности норт моретон, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh De Stanford было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Noers, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William De Sydenham, Lord Titchmarsh перед 1234 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 25 декабря 1242 г. в местности вудстокк, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 31 год.
